sellers_note: Experience luxury and capability in the Silver 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee 4x4 Limited with only 1,827 miles! This SUV blends rugged performance with premium comfort, powered by a Pentastar 3.6L V6 engine and 8-speed automatic transmission. Enjoy advanced technology with a 10.1-inch Uconnect infotainment system, wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and TomTom navigation with over-the-air updates. Safety is top-tier with adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, front and rear automatic emergency braking, and blind spot monitoring. Relax in heated leatherette seats, dual-zone automatic climate control, and a heated steering wheel. The dual-pane panoramic sunroof, polished aluminum alloy wheels, and power liftgate add style and convenience. Don't miss this nearly new Grand Cherokee-ready for your next adventure!
